title: 2019 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
page_name: 2019 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
page_topic: 2019 SHOP dental plan information for small businesses
content:
Dental coverage is offered as part of some SHOP health plans, but not all of them. Free-standing plans are also available in the SHOP Marketplace. Available 2019 free-standing dental plans and prices are shown below.

For 2018 SHOP dental plan information, visit this page

Note: The chart below will be most useful to developers, professionals, researchers, and others who want to study, analyze, and download the complete dataset of plan and price information. For all others, please use our user-friendly tool for previewing 2019 plans and prices.

See all 2019 SHOP health plans available to small businesses.

View instructions or download (XLSX file).

Learn more about the Affordable Care Act.
